title: Tool Schema Evolution
constraints: The tool must work with the new API that requires the 'output_format' parameter
Existing agent prompts and workflows that call the tool must not break
The tool must provide a sensible default for the new required parameter
The tool's description must reflect the updated capabilities
hints: Add the new parameter with a default value so existing callers that don't pass it still work
Update the tool's docstring to mention the new parameter and its accepted values
Consider a wrapper that maps the old schema to the new one, applying defaults for missing fields

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: The upstream API now requires 'output_format' (one of: 'json', 'text', 'csv')
# but our tool schema doesn't include it. Every call fails with:
# "API Error: Missing required parameter 'output_format'"
# TODO: Update the tool to support the new parameter without breaking existing callers

@tool
def fetch_report(company: str, year: int) -> str:
    """Fetch an annual report for a company."""
    # Old API call — worked before the API update
    # response = api.get_report(company=company, year=year)
    # New API requires: api.get_report(company=company, year=year, output_format=...)
    # Simulating the new API behavior:
    raise ValueError(f"API Error: Missing required parameter 'output_format'. Must be one of: json, text, csv")

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a financial research assistant. Fetch company reports when asked."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [fetch_report], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[fetch_report])

result = executor.invoke({"input": "Get me Apple's 2024 annual report"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

# BUG: The upstream API now requires 'output_format' (one of: 'json', 'text', 'csv')
# but our tool schema doesn't include it. Every call fails with:
# "API Error: Missing required parameter 'output_format'"
# TODO: Update the tool to support the new parameter without breaking existing callers

@function_tool
def fetch_report(company: str, year: int) -> str:
    """Fetch an annual report for a company."""
    # Old API call — worked before the API update
    # response = api.get_report(company=company, year=year)
    # New API requires: api.get_report(company=company, year=year, output_format=...)
    # Simulating the new API behavior:
    raise ValueError(f"API Error: Missing required parameter 'output_format'. Must be one of: json, text, csv")

agent = Agent(
    name="Financial Research Assistant",
    instructions="You are a financial research assistant. Fetch company reports when asked.",
    tools=[fetch_report],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Get me Apple's 2024 annual report")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai.tools import tool

# BUG: The upstream API now requires 'output_format' (one of: 'json', 'text', 'csv')
# but our tool schema doesn't include it. Every call fails with:
# "API Error: Missing required parameter 'output_format'"
# TODO: Update the tool to support the new parameter without breaking existing callers

@tool
def fetch_report(company: str, year: int) -> str:
    """Fetch an annual report for a company."""
    # Old API call — worked before the API update
    # response = api.get_report(company=company, year=year)
    # New API requires: api.get_report(company=company, year=year, output_format=...)
    # Simulating the new API behavior:
    raise ValueError(f"API Error: Missing required parameter 'output_format'. Must be one of: json, text, csv")

research_agent = Agent(
    role="Financial Research Assistant",
    goal="Fetch and present company annual reports in the requested format.",
    backstory="You are a financial research assistant that retrieves company reports.",
    tools=[fetch_report],
)

task = Task(
    description="Get me Apple's 2024 annual report",
    expected_output="The annual report content for Apple for the year 2024.",
    agent=research_agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[research_agent], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: New parameter is supported
evaluationCriteria.description: The tool accepts the 'output_format' parameter and passes it to the API

evaluationCriteria.label: Backward compatible
evaluationCriteria.description: Existing callers that don't specify output_format still work via a default value

evaluationCriteria.label: No API errors
evaluationCriteria.description: The tool no longer raises the 'Missing required parameter' error
